{"cards": [{"name": "Pyroclastic Eruption", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• ~ deals 4 damage to target creature.
• ~ deals 2 damage to each creature.
• ~ deals 3 damage to target player or planeswalker.", "flavor_text": "The mountain's fury knows no bounds.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal red instant that offers versatility between single-target removal, board clear, and direct damage. The 'choose two' format tests modal templating while staying in red's wheelhouse of damage-based effects. Costed at 4 mana to be powerful but fair for rare slot."}, {"name": "The Wild Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Create a 2/2 green Bear creature token.
III — Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Green Saga that follows a natural progression: ramp (I), create a threat (II), then pump your team (III). Each chapter represents core green effects - land ramp, creature tokens, and +1/+1 counters. The escalating power level fits Saga design philosophy."}, {"name": "Forgotten Sanctum", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "Once a place of worship, now a refuge for the lost and forgotten.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Colorless utility land that enters tapped and provides colorless mana, with an expensive activated ability for card selection. The scry ability is costed high enough to be fair at uncommon while providing meaningful late-game utility."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "In the heart of the wilderness, life finds its truest expression.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Standard basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the essence of green mana and nature's vitality. Basic lands are always common and have the standard mana-producing ability."}]}
